prompt: Linocut printmaking style, psychedelic geological strata, topographic contour lines, terraced hill design, vintage engraving texture, bold ink outlines, warm earth tones, fiery orange, ochre, and deep black contrast, retro 1970s graphic design.
style: Retro Linocut Topographic Art / Psychedelic Strata. Coarse woodcut and offset-print texture, strong linework, high-saturation red-orange-black palette.
composition: Poster-like square composition, layered terraced hills and contour bands filling the frame, clear graphic hierarchy, no border.
lighting: Flat printmaking contrast with bold ink separation, vintage 1970s psychedelic mood.
palette: fiery orange, ochre, rust red, warm earth tones, deep black
materials: rough linocut ink, vintage engraving grain, screenprint imperfections
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Preserve crisp contour-line structure and tactile print texture.
negative: photorealism, smooth gradients, glossy 3D, soft watercolor, readable typography
